TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Edirne Edirne, gu icuwa i Edirne Province, Turkey. ala atjunangn mapuljat 0.844 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 0.326 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 0.42 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 400.280 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 6.098 a daceneqlan, Turkey (66%) a maqcuwa caucau. kadjunangan kinaqadaqadavan zazaljuvan cinalivatan caucau pinavadavadayan na caucau sinusupuan ta caucau ljemita tua cavilj paljavak tua atjunang matja 20 qinaljan i Edirne. matja 24 qinaljan imaza, Kocasinan, Fatih, Ňě√ľkr√ľpaŇüa, ńįstasyon, 1. Murat, Barutluk, Menzilahir, NiŇüancńĪpaŇüa, Medrese Ali Bey, SaricapaŇüa, Sabuni, TalatpaŇüa, Meydan, BabademirtaŇü, Abdurrahman, √áavuŇübey, MithatpaŇüa, Dilaverbey, Yeniimaret, YńĪldńĪrńĪm HacńĪ Sarraf, YńĪldirim BeyazńĪt, Karaańüa√ß. pinaljavakan tatuluan sipacacekilan palidring a djalan basu k

S.FORM: Edirne Edirne, gu icuwa i Edirne Province, Turkey. ala atjunangn mapuljat 0.844 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 0.326 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 0.42 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 400.280 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 6.098 a daceneqlan, Turkey (66%) a maqcuwa caucau. kadjunangan kinaqadaqadavan zazaljuvan cinalivatan caucau pinavadavadayan na caucau sinusupuan ta caucau ljemita tua cavilj paljavak tua atjunang matja 20 qinaljan i Edirne. matja 24 qinaljan imaza, Kocasinan, Fatih, Ňě√ľkr√ľpaŇüa, ńįstasyon, 1.
